programme.title: Unplugging
programme.desc: Unplugging is a sexy and funny digital detox starring Eva Longoria (Desperate Housewives), Matt Walsh (Veep) and Lea Thompson (Back to the Future). Think a rustic getaway with no phone service, internet or social media is a romantic way to repair your marriage and sex life? Think again. The only spark in Dan and Jeanine's bedroom is from the plug socket and the only solution for this married couple is a quiet, relaxing weekend in a remote mountain village. But what starts as the perfect weekend quickly becomes a disastrous one and without GPS to guide them, or social media to stave off their boredom, Dan and Jeanine are forced to rediscover each other.

programme.title: Greener Grass
programme.desc: 'Greener Grass' is a hilariously deadpan hellscape of competitive suburbia with a boldly stylised absurdist chain of events that unfurls with increasing fervour after one soccer mom gifts another her infant daughter just to be polite. Writers, directors and stars Jocelyn DeBoer and Dawn Luebbe have created a unique comedy that is destined to be a cult classic. "It's like Wes Anderson taking on a Black Mirror instalment...or David Lynch suddenly directing an episode of Desperate Housewives" - Indiewire

programme.title: Dick
programme.desc: The year is 1972 and like most high-school students, Betsy Jobs (Kirsten Dunst) and Arlene Lorenzo (Michelle Williams) just want to have a good time. But when, during a class field trip to the White House, they cluelessly wander into a behind-closed-doors, top-secret shredding session, it's time toboth wag the dog, and walk it. Seeking to uncover just how much the witless duo discovered, the Commander-In-Chief, appoints them "Official White House Dog Walkers," and it isn't long before the girls go from taking out Checkers, to taking out Tricky Dick, in this fun-raising comedy of historic distortions.

programme.title: Fantastic Mr. Fox
programme.desc: From director Wes Anderson comes his adaptation of beloved children's author Roald Dahl's novel about a fox battling angry farmers. Mr. and Mrs. Fox live an idyllic home life but after twelve years of quiet domesticity, the bucolic existence proves too much for Mr. Fox's wild animal instincts. Soon he slips back into his old ways as a sneaky chicken thief and in doing so, endangers not only his beloved family, but the whole animal community.

programme.title: The Cobbler
programme.desc: Max Simkin repairs shoes in the same New York shop that has been in his family for generations. Disenchanted with the grind of daily life, Max stumbles upon a magical heirloom that allows him to step into the lives of his customers and see the world in a new way. Sometimes walking in another man's shoes is the only way one can discover who they really are.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: The Nines
programme.desc: A troubled actor, a television show runner, and an acclaimed videogame designer find their lives intertwining in mysterious and unsettling ways.

programme.title: Iceland 63 66 N
programme.desc: The journey across Iceland continues through the beautiful Laugavegur, the so-called "Trail of Hot Springs"

programme.title: Lenny the Wonder Dog
programme.desc: After being implanted with a microchip that gives him special powers, a dog engages a young boy in conversation and adventure. Befriended by a local police officer, the dog, the boy and his friend go on a quest to save the world by undoing the insidious plot of an evil scientist to turn all kids into mindless robots.

programme.title: Tom's Midnight Garden
programme.desc: A young boy journeys across the boundaries of reality to a secret, haunted place, half-a-century back in time, in this tale of enchantment, shadows and lost memories.

programme.title: Hope Ranch
programme.desc: A young girl has it all—a beautiful ranch, a horse named Faith, and the love of her family. But after the death of her military father, she and her mother are in danger of losing their family ranch too. With a little help from friends and their majestic white horse, they hatch a plan to raise enough money to save the ranch while learning to never lose hope, despite all odds.

programme.title: The Book And The Rose
programme.desc: John Barnes is about to go off to war in the 1940s. Before he leaves, he acquires an old book filled with intriguing handwritten notes. He begins a correspondence with its previous owner -- and it promises to be more than just an exchange of letters.

programme.title: Timeless Love
programme.desc: Megan seems to have the perfect life with a wonderful husband named Thomas and 2 adorable children. Then she finds herself awakening from a coma – and discovers she is not and has never been married. But when she meets Thomas for real, she seizes the chance to help him fall in love with her, again—for the first time.

programme.title: Beauty and the Billionaire: Bali
programme.desc: American doctor Ivy Miller lives in Bali, working at a charitable health clinic. When a billionaire benefactor named Dylan Donnelly arrives, Ivy is less than impressed. He is only interested in making himself look better by appearing charitable. Ivy is happy when he goes on his way, but then an accident injures one of Dylan's trusted advisors, Blake. Dylan insists Ivy stay at Dylan's lavish estate in Bali to care for Blake until he's well.

programme.title: Love at First Lie
programme.desc: When Sarah Goldman, a lovely young school teacher in Chicago, wants to please her parents, she invents a boyfriend whom she believes will be the man of her mother's dreams. When her parents insist on meeting the man, Sarah hires Bob, an actor, to pretend to be her "beau". The masquerade works flawlessly for a time and brings comic situations, but in the end, their lives are irrevocably changed.

programme.title: Fat Brothers of Trinity
programme.desc: The bizarre adventures of the three gunmen Western grosser, next to a delicate young.

programme.title: Taste of Killing
programme.desc: Dubious Bounty Killer Hank Fellows tracks bank stage coaches to observe them being robbed.

programme.title: Buffalo Bill in Tomahawk Territory
programme.desc: Buffalo Bill tries to protect the Indian's land from a gang who want to get the gold buried there.

programme.title: Damned Pistols of Dallas
programme.desc: Outlaw Fast Draw (Álvarez) assaults stagecoach with passengers Clay Stone (Beir), singer Katy Dior (Marandi) and gambler Fred Foster (Mathot), but Stone is ready to take revenge.

programme.title: My Name Is Shanghai Joe
programme.desc: A Chinese immigrant, recently arrived in America, fights to free Mexican slaves from their cruel master.

programme.title: Christmas in Wonderland
programme.desc: Starring Matthew Knight and Chris Kattan. Three children and their father move from California to Canada. When they go shopping at the mall, they find counterfeit cash, inadvertently help catch crooks, and make a discovery about Santa.

programme.title: Finding Mrs. Claus
programme.desc: When Mrs. Claus (Mira Sorvino) feels neglected by her less than attentive husband (Will Sasso), she goes to Las Vegas to help a little girl with her Christmas wish.

programme.title: A Christmas Village
programme.desc: To save her reputation, Piper Jensen, a public relations genius and owner of her own PR company, agrees to work for the owner of a failing Santa's Village and discovers love and how magical Christmas is after all.

programme.title: Made For You, With Love
programme.desc: The owner of a second hand wedding dress business breathes new life into used dresses, making dreams come true for brides unable to afford pricey gowns. But when she meets the perfect guy, she's afraid to give her own heart a second chance at love.

programme.title: Sincerely, Yours Truly
programme.desc: When Hayley finds a wedding ring with a letter hidden in a drawer in her new condo, she decides to write back… and the mysterious lover replies, starting a chain of letters and events that will change her life for ever!

programme.title: Instakiller
programme.desc: When teenager Harper becomes internet famous overnight, mom Layla's worried about the sudden attention – a fear that's justified when Harper is soon stalked online. Before too long the stalking has turned violent and Layla must face down the psychopath who is willing to kill her and her daughter.

programme.title: Spy Cat
programme.desc: Spoiled and innocent, chubby house cat Marnie lives a comfortable and pampered life in the Sunshine household. She has never ventured outside the family home and only knows about the real world through her favourite detective, crime TV-shows. When Paul, who can't stand his sister's spoiled pet, abandons Marnie at a rural petrol station she comes across a loyal band of drifters who join forces to capture a notorious, local gang of petty thieves.

programme.title: An Elephant's Journey
programme.desc: A circus owner's 14-year old daughter, Dawn, sneaks Flora from the circus after she finds the perfect place for retirement: an elephant sanctuary 480 km away. All that stands between them and the safety of the elephant preserve is hundreds of kilometres of woods, one raging river, two elephant hunters and the fear of not making it. A.k.a. Saving Flora

programme.title: A Stork's Journey
programme.desc: Richard is a sparrow. Orphaned at birth and raised by storks, he believes that he is a stork, too! But when winter comes and his adoptive flock prepare to migrate to Africa, his true identity is revealed and his family must leave him behind in the forest with the other sparrows. Determined to prove he is a stork after all, Richard ventures south on an epic adventure, accompanied by friends big and small, to unleash his true potential and be reunited with his family.

programme.title: Othello
programme.desc: The Moorish general Othello is manipulated into thinking that his new wife Desdemona has been carrying on an affair with his lieutenant Michael Cassio when in reality it is all part of the scheme of a bitter ensign named Iago.

programme.title: Our Quarantine
programme.desc: In the port of Cagliari, 16 Moroccan workers are governing a ship. They govern their work. They renounce, voluntarily, on their freedom, hoping to preserve their work and to recover the wages in arrears. The ship is their temporary home, where they sleep, eat, pray, observe Ramadan. In Rome a University teacher has “forced” a young student to follow this story. For reasons of study, but also for reasons of “life”. Maybe Salvatore will learn something by this affair. Or maybe not…

programme.title: Parlor, Bedroom and Bath
programme.desc: A man tries passing off a socially awkward fellow as a Casanova in the hopes of marrying off his would be sister-in-law.

programme.title: Pelle The Conqueror
programme.desc: When his wife dies, Lasse takes his 12-year-old son, Pelle, from their home in Sweden to Denmark in search of a better life.

programme.title: Plan 9 From Outer Space
programme.desc: Evil aliens attack Earth and set their terrible "Plan 9" into action. As the aliens resurrect the dead of the Earth, the lives of the living are in danger.

programme.title: The Eye
programme.desc: A blind girl receives a cornea transplant so that she is able to see again. However, she gets more than she bargains for when she realizes she can see disturbing ghosts.

programme.title: The Body
programme.desc: A crucified body dated back to the first century A.D is uncovered at an ancient cave in Jerusalem. Trouble ensues as word spreads.

programme.title: Legendary
programme.desc: Cal Chetley is a bright, engaging, undersized fifteen year-old who's been picked on most of his life. Cal joins his high school wrestling team in the hopes his brother will train him. More importantly, Cal uses wrestling as the tool to reunite his family.

programme.title: The Arrival
programme.desc: Radio astronomer Zane Zaminsky believes he has picked up a cosmic noise that signals extraterrestrial intelligence. His desperate search for answers leads him to discover that aliens are already on Earth and in the process of preparing to take it over.

programme.title: Archenemy
programme.desc: Max Fist, who claims to be a hero from another dimension who fell through time and space to earth, where he has no powers.No one believes his stories except for a local teen named Hamster.

programme.title: Upside Down
programme.desc: Ever since Adam (Jim Sturgess) and Eden (Kirsten Dunst) fell in love as teens, their bond has faced astronomical odds. The pair are separated, not just by social class or the political system committed to keeping them apart, but also by a freak planetary condition: they live on twinned, parallel worlds with opposing gravitational forces. Years later, after suffering the pain of being torn apart, Adam decides to set out on a quest to once again find Eden and reconnect with his lost love.

programme.title: The Final Cut
programme.desc: Welcome to the not-too-distant future, where implanted microchips record every single moment of a person's life. Upon death, it becomes the job of a "cutter" like Alan Hakman (Oscar-winner Robin Williams) to edit down the deceased's entire lifetime into a fitting memorial film. For years, he has used his god-like power of final cut to absolve the dead of a multitude of sins. But when, on his latest assignment, he views a terrible secret that can't be erased, Hakman finds his own life in jeopardy in this riveting science fiction thriller.

programme.title: The Day Time Ended
programme.desc: A futuristic solar home in the far desert was supposed to be their refuge from urban crime. To their horror, the family discovers they're caught in a mind-boggling time warp caused by mysterious aliens with a sinister secret.

programme.title: Tangent Room
programme.desc: Trapped in a mysterious room with no escape, four brilliant minds race against time to prevent a cosmic collapse of the universe. They must learn to work together and solve the puzzle before it's too late.

programme.title: WWJD II The Woodcarver
programme.desc: A troubled youth vandalizes a church and winds up in a close association with the woodcarver whose work he destroyed.

programme.title: One Last Dance
programme.desc: In the wake of tragedy, a renowned NY dance company is on the brink of collapse. After leaving the dance world for good, Travis, Chrissa and Max have one last chance to re-connect with the passion and prove that miracles really can happen.

programme.title: It Had to be You
programme.desc: When her ad agency is absorbed by a much larger, more powerful firm, Darby's rivalry with new partner Derrick could blossom into something else.

programme.title: Undercover Angel
programme.desc: When a little girl prays for a miracle to help her recently divorced mother settle in their new town and fixer-upper house, an angel posing as a handyman, is sent down from heaven to help. While trying to accomplish his mission, the angel falls for the mother, ultimately forcing him into the unlikeliest of choices.

programme.title: Scarborough
programme.desc: Two mismatched lovers arrive at the British seaside town of Scarborough, seeking an escape from the constraints of real life. Liz, desperately shy and beautiful, seems older than her companion, the happy-go-lucky and impulsive Daz. In their faded hotel room, amongst the peeling wallpaper and away from the prying eyes of their hometown, they laugh, quarrel, make love and enjoy their anonymity. In an identical room in the same hotel, the sensitive artist Aiden and Beth, a fiery and impulsive young woman, tell the same story.

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Ashley Albright (LINDSAY LOHAN) is the luckiest woman in the world, a person to whom all the good things in life have come far too easily. She can pick a lottery ticket at random and hit the jackpot. In New York, the world's busiest city, Ashley never has to wait for a cab. And she has a terrific job as an account exec at a prestigious public relations firm. Everything goes Ashley's way. And now, she's been given a great opportunity to advance her career: she is to plan a masquerade ball in downtown Manhattan for record mogul Damon Phillips (Faizon Love) and his company.

programme.title: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Milo Boyd (Gerard Butler), a down-on-his-luck bounty hunter, gets his dream job when he is assigned to track down his bail-jumping ex-wife, reporter Nicole Hurly (Jennifer Aniston). He thinks all that's ahead is an easy payday, but when Nicole gives him the slip so she can chase a lead on a murder cover-up, Milo realizes that nothing ever goes simply with him and Nicole. The exes continually one-up each other – until they find themselves on the run for their lives. They thought their promise to love, honor and obey was tough – staying alive is going to be a whole lot tougher. Andy Tennant (Hitch, Sweet Home Alabama) directs.

programme.title: The Competition
programme.desc: Lauren Mauldin (Thora Birch) is a strong-willed but misguided young woman who encourages her millions of blog followers to apply her scientific formula to all romantic relationships in order to prevent heartache. If you follow her six-month PIG Theory, you will always have the upper hand and you will never be cheated on! Her plan works smoothly until her sister Gena introduces her to the charming and undefeated womens' advocate attorney, Calvin Chesney (Chris Klein). Calvin refuses to believe human connections can be so easily categorised. He challenges Lauren to a competition to prove her theory wrong.

programme.title: Jane Got a Gun
programme.desc: A mother fights to defend her family from being massacred at the hands of a ruthless and violent gang.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Five teenagers, infused with superhuman abilities, must harness their newfound powers to battle alien invaders

programme.title: The Legend Of Hercules
programme.desc: Banished by the king, Hercules harnesses his powers and gathers an army to fight his way back to his kingdom.

programme.title: Replicas
programme.desc: A neuroscientist secretly tries to clone and create replicas of his family after a tragic car crash.

programme.title: IP Man: The Awakening
programme.desc: The legendary Ip Man returns to the big screen to uncover the first action-packed chapter in the story of the man who would become a world-renowned martial arts master.

programme.title: Tomorrow Morning
programme.desc: Tomorrow Morning is the story of one couple seen in two separate timelines, a decade apart. This is a story of life, love, misunderstanding and hope... a universal and timeless tale.

programme.title: Call of The Wild
programme.desc: Call of The Wild is a modern-day story incorporating elements of Jack London's classic short novel. Whilst Ryann (Ariel Gade) is staying with her Grandpa Bill (Christopher Lloyd) a wild hybrid wolf/dog shows up injured on the back porch one night. Ryann and a local friend believe they can train the magnificent animal to become a sled dog leader but first they must try and persuade Grandpa, who knows the animal will eventually have to return to the wild. Then they must stand up to the local bully who wants to claim the dog as his own.

programme.title: For the Love of Benji
programme.desc: Benji is on holiday with his family in Greece, but after getting separated at the airport, he finds himself on another exciting adventure, now on the run from international spies!

programme.title: Pet
programme.desc: When a simple crush leads to an obsession of the deadly kind. Sweetly innocent Seth works in an animal shelter and soon bumps into an old crush. Subsequently he becomes obsessed with her, but after being rejected more than once, he decides to kidnap her and lock her in a cage. But what will the victim have in store for her captor? A perfectly uncomfortable and claustrophobic horror with a twist!

programme.title: Slightly Single in LA
programme.desc: Fun, flirty and downright outrageous. Independent, LA singleton Dale (Lacey Chabert, Mean Girls) is sick and tired of her troublesome love life. On the verge of giving up, she is reunited with an old friend - successful heartthrob and rock star Zach. Is this Dale's lucky chance to fall in love? Also starring Jenna Dewan (Step Up) and Jonathan Bennett (Mean Girls). Perfect for a girls night in!

programme.title: Jasper Jones
programme.desc: A riveting and moving coming of age story based on the best-selling novel. Charlie is startled when he is woken by local mixed-race outcast Jasper, who leads him deep into the forest to show them something that will change his life forever. A moving drama starring Toni Collette (Hereditary), Hugo Weaving (The Matrix), Levi Miller (Pan) and Angourie Rice (The Nice Guys).

programme.title: The Bombing
programme.desc: Inspired by the heroic, untold true story of Chongqing. Starring legends Bruce Willis (Die Hard) and Adrien Brody (The Pianist), this pulse-pounding war epic centres around the courage of Chinas citizens during WWII. As U.S. Air Force commander Jack Johnson trains the Chinese aviators to battle Japanese fighters, a hot-headed pilot begs to fly a powerful bomber that could stop the attacks.

programme.title: The Box
programme.desc: A couple receive a box and the offer of one million dollars if they push the button within it. But once it has been pushed, someone they do not know will die. Stars Cameron Diaz, James Marsden (2009)

programme.title: Asteroid Final Impact
programme.desc: A disgraced scientist has to use cutting edge satellite technology to save the world from being destroyed by a rogue asteroid. Starring Mark Lutz and Anna Van Hooft (2015).

programme.title: WILD WEST CHRONICLES
programme.desc: Gunslinger-turned-reporter Bat Masterson chronicles the wildest stories of the Old West.

programme.title: WILD WEST CHRONICLES
programme.desc: Gunslinger-turned-reporter Bat Masterson chronicles the wildest stories of the Old West.

programme.title: WILD WEST CHRONICLES
programme.desc: Gunslinger-turned-reporter Bat Masterson chronicles the wildest stories of the Old West.

programme.title: The Wrong Mother
programme.desc: A couple hire a nanny to take care of their twin children their egg donor. The crazy woman has now come to claim "her" babies. Starring Vanessa Marcil (2017)

programme.title: Together Forever Tea
programme.desc: Lara discovers a dream her late aunt never fulfilled. With the help of a handsome local, her journey through the sleepy town of Kissing Falls takes her on an unexpected path

programme.title: Designed with Love
programme.desc: Sky gets an exciting offer for her clothing line to be featured in a department store. But first, she must prove that she can make $10k worth of sales. (2020)

programme.title: THE STORY OF US
programme.desc: Jamie owns a bookstore called True Love and has helped couples fall in love.

programme.title: Great! Movie News Extra 2023
programme.desc: From red carpet glamour to Hollywood gossip, interviews and new movies, get a round-up of our weekly showbiz news in GREAT! Movie News Extra.

programme.title: Summer of Dreams
programme.desc: A washed-up pop-star moved back to her hometown to teach music at the local high school. Starring Debbie Gibson (2016)

programme.title: Feed
programme.desc: Olivia and Matthew Grey, 18-year-old twins born into a world of privilege and high expectations. There are almost no boundaries between them even their dreams are connected.

programme.title: The Beaver
programme.desc: Two-time Academy Award winner Jodie Foster directs and co-stars with two-time Academy Award winner Mel Gibson in The Beaver - an emotional story about a man on a journey to re-discover his family and re-start his life.
"21" is the fact-based story about six MIT students who were trained to become experts in card counting and subsequently took Vegas casinos for millions in winnings.

programme.title: Pelé: Birth of a Legend
programme.desc: This biographical drama chronicles the life of one of the world's greatest footballers.

programme.title: Blue Thunder
programme.desc: A tough but straight-arrow cop battles a group of military and government elitists who have developed an extraordinary helicopter into the ultimate weapon.

programme.title: Sniper (1993)
programme.desc: A seasoned sniper and a rookie marksman are teamed in the Panamanian jungle to eliminate some bad guys. but they also must fight against rogue CIA agents, mercenaries and drug cartel members.

programme.title: Berry Gordy's The Last Dragon
programme.desc: An enjoyable pastiche of martial arts, romance, music, and video, THE LAST DRAGON presents a likable young hero, Leroy (Taimak), who aspires to become a kung fu master. Trouble arises in the form of a huge man who calls himself "Sho' Nuff, who is determined to prove himself the kung fu master of the neighborhood.

programme.title: Street Fighter
programme.desc: Based on the popular video game, a rogue military commander defies orders and battles one-on-one with the evil General Bison, a psychotic kidnapper holding 63 people hostage.

programme.title: It Could Happen To You
programme.desc: Much to the horror of his upwardly mobile wife, a New York City cop makes good on his promise to split his lottery winnings with a waitress in this delightful comedy. Money changes everything, and all three lives are transformed in this charming comedy.

programme.title: The Meddler
programme.desc: An aging widow from New York City follows her daughter to Los Angeles in hopes of starting a new life after her husband passes away.

programme.title: Multiplicity
programme.desc: An overextended dad, husband and businessman becomes the ultimate split personality by having himself cloned.

programme.title: 30 Minutes or Less
programme.desc: The tale of three slacker friends and the adventures that ensure after one of them inadvertently robs a bank armed only with a large salami.

programme.title: A Memory In My Heart
programme.desc: Rebecca Vega doesn't remember anything of her life prior to waking up in a hospital eight years ago. Now that she and her husband Joe have begun trying to have a child, she has been plagued with headaches and recurring nightmares. After a fateful encounter with a curious stranger who claims to recognize her, Rebecca's memory is jolted when she sees a picture of herself and her three children. Armed with only the photo, the location of a small town, and the name Chase Stewart, Rebecca sets out to find some answers. Refusing to be intimidated by Stewart's threats and schemes, Rebecca slowly but surely uncovers the facts that allow her to reclaim her children and her past.

programme.title: La Vie En Rose
programme.desc: From the slums of Paris to the limelight of New York, Edith Piaf's life was a battle to sing and survive, live and love. Raised in poverty, Edith's magical voice and her passionate romances and friendships with the greatest names of the period - Yves Montand, Jean Cocteau, Charles Aznavour, Marlene Dietrich, Marcel Cerdan and others - made her a star all around the world. But in her audacious attempt to tame her tragic destiny, the Little Sparrow - her nickname - flew so high she could not fail to burn her wings.

programme.title: Love and Honor
programme.desc: While fighting for his country in Vietnam, Dalton finds out that his girlfriend back home has dumped him. He has one week's leave coming up so decides to escape the war and fly half way round the world to get her back. Joined by his best friend, they go A.W.O.L from the horrors of the war zone, and have seven days to get back to America, change his girlfriend's mind and make it back without anyone noticing. Along the way they must make some life changing decisions as they learn the truth about love, honour and commitment.

programme.title: The Way
programme.desc: Martin Sheen plays Tom, an American doctor who comes to France to collect the remains of his adult son who was killed in the Pyrenees in a storm while walking The Camino de Santiago - also known as 'The Way of Saint James'. Driven by his desire to understand his lost son, Tom decides to embark on the historical pilgrimage, leaving his California life behind. Armed only with his son's backpack and guidebook, he begins the 800km historical pilgrimage but soon discovers that he won't be alone on this journey - he meets other pilgrims from around the world, all broken and looking for greater meaning in their lives.

programme.title: Elektra
programme.desc: From the pages of Marvel Comics — creators of X-Men and Spider-Man — comes ELEKTRA, the first action-event movie of the year. In the ultimate battle between good and evil stands a warrior who makes the choice that tips the balance.

programme.title: Birth of the Dragon
programme.desc: In the world of martial arts, there is one man above all: Bruce Lee. San Francisco, 1965. Young, hungry and looking for an opportunity to make a name for himself, Lee (Philip Ng) challenges legendary Shaolin monk and kung fu master, Wong Jack Man (Yu Xia), to a fight when he hears that he's crossing the Pacific to observe the state of kung fu in America. Their legendary fight would change the history of martial arts forever.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: In this live action movie-length version of the famous four, The Evil Shredder has returned to cause more mayhem and kidnaps the rat Ninja Master. But the Turtles have been armed with Professor Perry's Anti Mutant antidote and, with the help of a journalist, embark on an adventure to save the Ninja Master.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II: The Secret of the Ooze
programme.desc: The Turtles have been forced to move in with their friend the news reporter April O'Neil, because the Foot Clan knows the whereabouts of their lair in the sewers. While the Turtles are looking for a new home, they encounter a pizza delivery boy, Keno, who is trying to fight off a band of robbers. The Turtles intervene and help him. The turtles learn that Shredder is not dead and that he is searching for the green ooze that created them. Shredder hopes to create a group of mutant animals to use against the turtles. So the turtles have to prove again that they are the better ninja fighters.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Craig joins Kristina at Sango Lodge in the heart of the Save Valley Conservancy where they explore the vast, rugged wilderness. Kristina joins Byrce Clemence and his anti-poaching team as they demonstrate the effectiveness of the anti-poaching dog unit. Tracking notorious rhino on foot keeps their senses alert. Find out what causes the crew to hit the floor.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Back on the banks of Lake Kariba, Kristina is hosted by the luxurious Bumi Hills Safari Lodge. She tracks lions with her guide Madison, witness elephants swimming and challenges Madison to a fishing bet and finally gets to tick an elusive cat off her bucket list.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: The safari continues at Bumi Hills Safari Lodge where Kristina joins the anti-poaching unit on their everyday, thrilling duties. The fishing challenges with Madison continue and the breath-taking lakeshore game viewing experiences keep coming.

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: The vet students meet for the first time and travel 7 hours to the remote clinic. We learn about their fears and insecurities -- fear of failure and the weight of responsibilities ahead.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Kristina travels back to Mana Pools to experience the untamed wilderness in the extreme dry season. Her guide, Cloud, takes her on an expedition to find lion cubs and wild dog puppies. Will they find what they are looking for?

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Still based at Zambezi Expeditions Camp, Richard guides Kristina into her closest encounter with a wild bull elephant. An evening excursion to Kanga Pan leads to breath-taking sightings of elusive creatures of the night

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Kristina heads to Camp Amalinda on the edge of the Matopos National Park. Her guide, Dardley, shares some of the history of this World Heritage Site and intriguing rock paintings. They track white rhino on foot and she learns about the distinctive rock formations.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Dardley joins Kristina at Ivory Lodge on the edge of Hwange National Park where her predator sightings just keep getting better. They get unbelievably close to wild cheetah and witness something incredible.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Kristina's guide, Andy, treats her to wonderful riverbed drives and wild encounters on foot. They happen upon a magnificent leopard with her impala kill up a tree and an eventful night drive leads them into a potential battle as a coalition of 3 foreign male lions step into the resident king's territory!

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: The safari continues at Kavinga where Kristina and Andy have more interactions with Juno, the resident lion king. A late drive leads them to the predators of the night. They come across a lion eating a porcupine and Morgan the elephant decides to join them at the bar with a weakness for lemons!

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: Drew and Agatha have to deal with a dog with a broken leg brought in by a group of youngsters with no money. Will Agatha stand up to Drew who has decided to send them away to find money, by insisting the dog stays at the clinic?

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: Charlotte has growing cynicism towards the owner of the emaciated black dog, when he repeatedly dodges his responsibility. Charlotte and Roxy set out on a house call to investigate. What will they find at the owner's house? What condition are his other dogs in?

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: Dr. Greg sets up a darting competition – the winner gets to dart a zebra on an upcoming case. Delarey, the hunter, is shocked when Roxanne, hits a bulls eye! Can he do the same?

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: During a rabies vaccination campaign Niven struggles to vaccinate a nervous dog. Will he see the task through or will his impatient nature let him down? An unvaccinated dog is a danger to the community.

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: Controversy between the vets heat up on the subject of hunting and animal welfare to the point where Tina threatens to call the police on a group going hunting.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: In the earth's polar regions, a ghostly flicker and colourful glow often brighten the night sky. Whoever sees an aurora event will never forget this impressive experience. Finland's Saami people, Alaska's Inuit, Canada's Native Americans and New Zealand's Maori all have legends about the origins and meaning of this magic natural spectacle. These stories tell of spirits dancing in the sky, of a bright and better world where hunting game is abundant, of battling gods and celestial messages.

programme.title: Billion Dollar Fish
programme.desc: They are virtually unchanged from their ancestors, who swam in ancient rivers when the dinosaurs still ruled the planet. Their unfertilised eggs became black gold, served in only the most expensive restaurants as caviar. This ancient giant is the Beluga Sturgeon, considered by some to be the largest freshwater fish in the world. Sturgeons are now at the very edge of extinction because of the exclusive market for their eggs, but only the eggs can allow the species to live. Paradoxically, the desire for caviar may now be the only chance they have for their future existence.

programme.title: Unnatural Selection
programme.desc: The wings of cliff swallows in Nebraska are getting shorter – while female turtles in Chesapeake Bay are getting larger. On the Galapagos Islands, two species of finches are developing back into one. Increasing numbers of peregrine falcons are living in urban areas – and have adapted their behaviour: thanks to the city lights, they have learned to hunt at night.

programme.title: Lions On The Move
programme.desc: Kevin Richardson shares an extraordinary bond with Africa's most fearsome predators. Together with them, he has experienced some real adventures. However, transporting 27 lions and 14 hyenas to a new home presents a different challenge.The lions' new home will be a sanctuary on the edge of Dinokeng, a South African game reserve spanning 18,000 square metres. The huge task ahead includes planning and designing the new enclosures, and securing permits to move the animals.

programme.title: Lions On The Move
programme.desc: Not only are the animals regularly rotated into new enclosures to prevent repetitive behaviour developing out of boredom, but Kevin also has to practice loading them in and out of the van. Can the reluctant lions and hyenas eventually be persuaded to get on board with the move?

programme.title: White Lions: Born Wild: White Lions: Born Wild
programme.desc: The two sisters are born as white as snow in May 2009 in South Africa's Kruger Park. Growing up in this vast, wild wilderness they must not only overcome the same survival challenges that all young lion cubs face, they must also overcome the threats their high visibility brings. In the African bush, anything unusual stands out and is often eliminated by eagle-eyed predators. Will our cubs survive? The odds are stacked against them – 80 percent of all newborn lion cubs don't make it to adulthood.

programme.title: White Lions: Born Wild: White Lions: Born Wild
programme.desc: ‘White Lions – Born Wild' is a true wildlife story, with strong characters and closely studied behaviour. We follow the cubs' progress as they embark on the pathway to adulthood, learning to hunt, learning to avoid danger, learning to live in their white coats. This is a strong behaviour-led film, a coming-of-age story of a very rare and unusual pair of lions. Through their eyes, we learn what it is really like to be a lion in Africa.

programme.desc: Outside of pursuing prey how effective is the cheetah when compared to other apex predators of the savannah?

programme.title: Showcase
programme.desc: We enjoy trumpeting elephants and honking hippos as we travel from Moremi Game Reserve to Blyde River Canyon.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: In this last episode of Super Senses we take the grand final tour to see the greatest of all the special weapons that help some animals to govern the wilderness. In this episode we see it, hear it, touch it, smell it and taste it like animals do.

programme.title: Wild Walk
programme.desc: The baboon human conflict in the western cape has taken an ugly turn with many of the cape peninsulas chacmas either being trapped and relocated or killed. Swati walks with baboons to find out what is causing this conflict and to look for solutions

programme.title: Wild Walk
programme.desc: Can wilderness be brought back to a land that has been overgrazed and farmed? The Karoo was once extensive across south Africa and home to a rich diversity of flora and fauna. Swati takes a wild walk there to see if the conservation plan is working

programme.title: Wild Walk
programme.desc: Can captive bred ambassador cheetahs of the Cheetah Outreach in Cape Town can help save their counterparts in the wild? Swati finds out if the motto of Cheetah Outreach, see it, Sense it, Save it, can help the wild cheetah?

programme.title: Wild Walk
programme.desc: Can the African elephant evers be tamed? Is it possible to sustain an entire tourism industry based on them being domesticated? Swati walks with the elephants of Knysna park while these questions are asked.

programme.title: Wild And Alive
programme.desc: Five critically endangered African species find protection in one modest haven - De Hoop Nature reserve is not only a World heritage Site it's also incredibly important for the survival of these iconic animal.

programme.title: Wild And Alive
programme.desc: On the coast of south Africa, a group of mammoth mammals is arriving from the deep ocean. Every year humpback and southern right whales make incredible migrations from the Antarctic seas to mate and give birth along this protected coastline

programme.title: Orphans of the Wild
programme.desc: Umbili and Shakira, the leopard cubs, are becoming a real threat to Zacheo's safety and they must be moved, on a more comical note the baby baboons are moved in with the juveniles.

programme.title: Orphans of the Wild
programme.desc: It's a year later, and things have changed – Marlice and Rudie have a new baby boy – and he needs to be introduced to the animals.

programme.title: Orphans of the Wild
programme.desc: Even at a Wildlife sanctuary poaching can rear it's ugly head and quick action needs to be taken.

programme.title: SafariLIVE Sunset Repeat
programme.desc: If you missed the LIVE show then catch up with your sunrise/sunset safari here.

programme.title: SafariLIVE Sunrise
programme.desc: As the sun rises in Africa, Join a LIVE safari and ask the expert guide questions in real time.

programme.title: Escape To Nature
programme.desc: Slow down and immerse yourself in nature with beautiful wildlife footage and sounds.

programme.title: Escape To Nature
programme.desc: Slow down and immerse yourself in nature with beautiful wildlife footage and sounds.

programme.title: Jamie's 30 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Fish Tray Bake - Jamie Oliver shows how to make a fish tray-bake with Jersey Royals, salsa verde and simple salad.

programme.title: Jamie's 30 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Macaroni Bake - Jamie makes cauliflower macaroni, chicory salad with 'insane dressing', followed by stewed fruit.

programme.title: Jamie & Jimmy's Food Fight Club
programme.desc: Patrick Stewart: Patrick Stewart drops by, and the boys find delicious uses for grain leftover after brewing beer.

programme.title: Jamie's Kitchen
programme.desc: While Jamie Oliver is on paternity leave the trainee chefs begin to slack off.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie takes mushrooms to a whole new level with his deliciously cheesy baked mushroom soup, and gives a classic salad a tasty twist with his stunning cauliflower remoulade.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie cooks his incredible avocado pastry quiche, with a delicious cheesy and basil filling, and shows us how to take a classic steak to the next level.

programme.title: Jamie's Comfort Food
programme.desc: Jamie and his old friend and mentor, Gennaro Contaldo, make bolognese ravioli from scratch – with pops of beautiful bolognese inside parcels of homemade royal pasta dough, all served in a silky tomato sauce.

programme.title: Jamie & Jimmy's Food Fight Club
programme.desc: Desserts - Jimmy and Jamie want to see if British puds can beat Italian desserts. Jonathan Ross pops into the caff to cook extra-special bread and butter pudding with the boys and to take on the 'After Eight challenge.'

programme.title: Jamie's Ultimate Veg
programme.desc: Jamie gets the veg party started with a bold black bean burger followed by a charred, crunchy salad with the coolest croutons, flavorful curry singing with spices, and veggie carbonara.

programme.title: Jamie's Quick & Easy Food
programme.desc: Pesto Chicken - 'Nduja - Sausage Bake : Jamie's cooking up super-indulgent Flaky Pastry Pesto Chicken, to treat the family.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Celebrity Season 05
programme.desc: The four best celebrity cooks remain and face three mammoth tasks.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Celebrity Season 05
programme.desc: The four semi-finalists face an Olympian challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Celebrity Season 05
programme.desc: The four semi-finalists must cook their best two-course meal to impress three world-class caterers.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Celebrity Season 05
programme.desc: The Celebrity MasterChef finals begin, and the three celebrities are set their toughest challenge yet - impressing the French!

programme.title: MasterChef UK Celebrity Season 05
programme.desc: It's the penultimate Celebrity MasterChef, and the three finalists are challenged to create two fine dining menus.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Celebrity Season 05
programme.desc: The three finalists have to cook their best three-course meal for one final judgement from the judges. At the end of the show one of them will be crowned Celebrity MasterChef Champion.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Celebrity Season 10
programme.desc: The first challenge is the invention test, the infamous test of imagination and creativity.

programme.title: Northern Ireland Starter
programme.desc: Its the turn of three chefs from Northern Ireland - Chris Fearon, Raymond McArdle, and Ian Orr - who will be judged by a veteran of the competition Michelin star chef Glynn Purnell.

programme.title: Northern Ireland Fish
programme.desc: The three Northern Ireland chefs cook their fish course. Chris Fearon serves up a creation called Stitched up like a kipper, Raymond McArdle serves Turbot called A day at the beach and Ian Orr creates a dish called Why did the scallop cross the roe.

programme.title: Northern Ireland Mains
programme.desc: Its time for the main course. Chris Fearons dish called Cowboy supper is inspired by the Wild West. Raymond McArdle creates a dish called Titanic smoked venison, tongue and cheek while Ian Orr cooks lamb and baked hay.

programme.title: Northern Ireland Dessert
programme.desc: Today is the chefs last chance to impress before the final two chefs are chosen to face the Great British Menu judging panel. Which dessert will help get two chefs through?

programme.title: Northern Ireland Judging
programme.desc: It's decision time for the chefs from Northern Ireland. One chef left the competition and only two remain, who will cook their entire menus for the Great British Menu judges, Prue Leith, Matthew Fort and Oliver Peyton.

programme.title: London and South East Starter
programme.desc: The curtain raises on London and the South East - newcomers Matt Gillan and Adam Simmonds come face-to-face with returning contender Tom Aikens. Today its the starter course and someone makes a schoolboy error.

programme.title: London and South East Fish
programme.desc: Today its the fish course and Tom and Matt battle it out with scallop dishes while Adam delivers Langoustine and Oysters. But who will come out on top?

programme.title: London and South East Main
programme.desc: Today its the main course. Rabbit, Rose veal and venison are all dished up for Great British Menu veteran Richard Corrigan. And one of the chefs is joined by Eastenders star June Brown for a fundraising challenge.

programme.title: London and South East Dessert
programme.desc: Today its the dessert course, will a strawberry and coconut dessert, a frozen white chocolate dish or apple and cherries come out on top. Great British Menu veteran judge Richard Corrigan will decide who goes through to the judges.

programme.title: London and South East Judging
programme.desc: It's decision time on Great British Menu Does Comic Relief for the chefs from London and the South East. One chef left the competition and only two remain, who will cook their entire menus for the judges, Prue Leith, Matthew Fort and Oliver Peyton.

programme.title: Final Starter
programme.desc: Actress Patricia Hodge, one of the stars of sit com Miranda will join judges Prue Leith, Oliver Peyton and Matthew Fort to taste all eight winning regional starter courses.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares: The Dovecote
programme.desc: In this British reality series, world-renowned chef Gordon Ramsay visits struggling restaurants in an effort to help them succeed.

programme.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 1, Norway
programme.desc: Season 2018 begins with 14 strongest men in the world, all competing for the title. The competition kicks off in Norway. We'll see typical Viking disciplines, team events and world records in heavy conditions in the land of snow and ice. They will suffer, they will freeze and fight in this first competition of the year for the title that they will carry on their shoulders throughout whole year.

programme.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 2, Germany
programme.desc: The next stop in strongest league of the world is muscle capital, largest number of strong shoulders per capichampions league on the planet. It's a FIBO - the biggest expo on planet Earth and the second stage of 2018 Strongman champions league, in Cologne, Germany.

programme.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 3, Abu Dhabi
programme.desc: For the first time in history, Strongman Champions League will set up competition in Abu Dhabi. The line-up of super athletes, who are part of the SCL, includes former world champions Dainis Zageris (Latvia) & Krzysztof Radzikowski (Poland), current world champion Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia) and biggest strongman in the World Sean O'Hagan (Ireland).

programme.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 4, Holland (Part 1)
programme.desc: Strongman classic in land where there is no place for anything else excepts strength, fight and endurance. Here are fourteen of the strongest men, fighting for the title of strongest in Holland.

programme.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 5, Holland (Part 2)
programme.desc: We go back to Holland, where former champion Dainis Zageris is in leading position after the first three events. Alongside Radzikowski, he is in this moment favorite for world title, and also leader shirt holder.

programme.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 6, Finland
programme.desc: Stage six of Strongman champions league, 2018 is set back on north, in Finland. Here we have Matjaz Belsak, wearing SCL leader shirt, one of the biggest strongman in the World Mika Torro, fan favorite strongman in all over the World – Will Baggott, and also big name from Baltic – Aivars Smaukstelis

programme.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 7, Serbia
programme.desc: Twelve strongman, including defending Worldchampion Matjaz Belsak from Slovenia , will compete on “Air spa” for the title of best in homeland country of Tesla, Pupin, Novak Djokovic. Matjaz Belsak is the SCL leader in this competition, chasing his third victory this season.
